items.caption: A vast, empty parking garage at sky harbor international airport in phoenix. the garage is characterized by its concrete floor and white ceiling, with a series of columns supporting the structure. a sign pointing towards the exit and parking is prominently displayed, indicating the direction for vehicles. taken from a low angle, emphasizing the scale and emptiness of the space. the date "march 27, 2020" and the context of airlines reducing flights due to the new coronavirus outbreak are also mentioned, providing a historical and contextual backdrop to the scene.
